entries.title: Recently viewed jobs
highlights: Added a **Recently Viewed** section on the jobs feed — your last 10 visited job listings are saved locally and shown at the top.
Works fully client-side using `localStorage`, so your history persists across page refreshes.
Each recently viewed card shows the job title, company, and location for quick re-access.

entries.title: Feedback page & changelog
highlights: Added a dedicated **Feedback** page so you can tell us what to improve.
Launched this public **Changelog** to track visible product changes.
You can edit this page by updating `src/content/changelog.json`.

entries.title: Job page improvements
highlights: Job detail pages now load significantly faster with improved server-side rendering.
Added **Apply** button pinned to the bottom on mobile for easier access.
Structured data (`JobPosting` schema) added to all job pages for better search visibility.

entries.title: Improved search & filters
highlights: Filter jobs by **employment type** (full-time, part-time, contract, internship).
Location filter now supports remote-first search — filter by `Remote` to find fully distributed roles.
Search queries are now reflected in the URL, making filtered results shareable.

entries.title: Next.js migration & new job feed
highlights: Migrated the main WorkWay experience to the new **Next.js** app.
Introduced the new **Jobs** feed with better filters and faster navigation.
Improved SEO and structured data for job and company pages.
